overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a dark, misty swamp and forest area at night. The scene transitions from dense woodland to open marshland with atmospheric fog, tall grass, and moonlight breaking through clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path with thick canopy cover

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through dense forest with swords strapped to his back, navigating between closely packed trees

entered.detail: thick overhead tree cover blocking most moonlight, creating dark green shadows
low bushes and ferns lining the forest path at knee height
tall oak tree trunk visible through the dense foliage ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a densely packed forest at night, with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail. The tree canopy blocks most of the sky, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere with low visibility. Undergrowth flanks both sides of the path as the character moves steadily forward through the woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional marsh edge with scattered trees and rising fog

events.description: emerging from dense tree cover into more open marshland with visible fog layer
moonlight becomes more visible through breaking cloud cover, illuminating the mist

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through thinning trees into the foggy wetland area, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: tall marsh reeds and grasses rising to waist height along the path edges
low-lying fog hovering over the marsh ground in the distance
isolated trees spaced apart, no longer forming a dense wall

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up as Geralt leaves the dense forest behind, entering a transitional marsh area. Scattered trees replace the thick canopy, and tall reeds begin to dominate the undergrowth. A layer of mist hangs in the air, and the moon becomes partially visible through the clouds, casting a blue-green glow over the wetland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marshland with distant ruins under moonlit sky

events.description: entering wide open marsh with full sky visibility and prominent moonlight
approaching raised earthen embankment or path edge on the left side

agents.ego_description: traversing the open wetland with weapons ready, moving toward distant silhouetted structures on the horizon

entered.detail: dark silhouettes of stone ruins or abandoned buildings visible against the night sky
raised dirt mound or path edge covered in grass forming a trail boundary
bright moon partially obscured by clouds directly ahead in the night sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vast marshland with unobstructed views of the moonlit sky. Tall reeds surround the path, and the silhouettes of distant ruins appear on the horizon. Geralt walks past an earthen embankment on the left while the camera captures the expansive, atmospheric wetland under the cloudy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic night forest that gradually opens into a misty, moonlit marshland. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail, where a dense canopy of trees blocks the sky and limits visibility. As the character moves steadily forward, the thick woodland begins to thin, allowing the environment to expand into a transitional wetland. The scene then shifts from the enclosed forest to an open area of scattered trees and tall reeds, while a layer of hanging mist emerges. Finally, the lighting transforms as the moon breaks through the clouds, casting a cool blue-green glow over the surrounding marsh.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast, moonlit marshland that emphasizes the scale of the atmospheric wetland. It begins by opening into an expansive view of the cloudy night sky, where the horizon is punctuated by the silhouettes of distant ruins. As the camera moves forward, it glides past tall reeds lining the path and an earthen embankment on the left. The scene finally settles into a wide, unobstructed perspective of the desolate landscape under the pale glow of the moon.
